mapper.update:
update seckill_voucher
status = #{status},
use_time = #{useTime},
where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into seckill_voucher (user_id, seckill_dish_id, voucher_code, status, order_time, use_time) values (#{userId}, #{seckillDishId}, #{voucherCode}, #{status}, #{orderTime}, #{useTime})
